evals.prompt: I'm about to work on the exim_geopolitics paper. Pull the latest from Overleaf first.
evals.expected_output: Runs git pull --rebase in the project directory. Reports what was pulled or that it's already up to date. If working tree is dirty, stashes first and pops after.

evals.prompt: Ok I'm done editing. Push everything back to Overleaf with the message 'revised intro and updated references'
evals.expected_output: Runs git status, git diff --stat, git add -A, git commit with the provided message 'revised intro and updated references', then git push. Reports success with summary.
Runs git status, git diff --stat, auto-generates a commit message from the changed files, git add -A, git commit, git push. Reports success with summary.
